headline: Michigan’s Upper Peninsula 911 Authority Selects Tyler Technologies’ Enterprise CAD and Enterprise Mobile Solutions
summary: PLANO, Texas, April 01, 2026--Tyler Technologies announced Michigan’s Upper Peninsula 911 Authority will deploy Tyler’s Enterprise CAD and Enterprise Mobile solutions.
